strand_description: The HUMSS strand focuses on developing students' understanding of society, culture, language, literature, philosophy, and human behavior. It builds strong communication, critical thinking, and research skills through subjects grounded in the social sciences and humanities.
core_academic_subjects: Komunikasyon at Pananaliksik sa Wika at Kulturang Pilipino
Pagbasa at Pagsusuri ng Iba't Ibang Teksto Tungo sa Pananaliksik
Introduction to World Religions and Belief Systems
Discipline and Ideas in the Social Sciences
Trends, Networks, and Critical Thinking in the 21st Century
Contemporary Philippine Arts from the Regions
holland_rationale: HUMSS students are predominantly Social because their curriculum focuses on people, communities, and helping professions. Artistic is common due to creative writing and communication-heavy subjects. Some students develop Enterprising traits through leadership roles and community engagement.
grade_note: HUMSS graduates typically excel in language arts, social studies, and humanities. Expect high GWA variability — some are high achievers, others are average. Program eligibility depends on GWA threshold per program.
common_student_profiles: The Student Leader — active in organizations, strong communication, Social/Enterprising type
The Researcher — enjoys reading, writing, and social science inquiry, Social/Investigative type
The Creative Writer — drawn to storytelling and expression, Artistic/Social type
The Community Advocate — passionate about social justice and helping others, Social type
